entry.data:
RAIN
LOWS IN THE MID 30S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

CLOUDY
RAIN IN THE MORNING, THEN A SLIGHT CHANCE OF RAIN AND DRIZZLE IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 40S
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY AFTER MIDNIGHT
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 40S
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
A 50 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
NOT AS COOL WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS, MAINLY IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
A 40 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
